summary: The user is getting back into model building, having recently completed a Revell F-15 Eagle kit and is now planning to work on a 1/72 scale B-29 bomber. They are seeking advanced weathering techniques, materials for adding details like antennas and aerials, and recommendations for products to enhance their modeling skills.
facts: The user recently finished a simple Revell F-15 Eagle kit that they picked up during a trip to the hobby store in late April. The user is planning to work on a 1/72 scale B-29 bomber next. The user has been experimenting with Vallejo acrylics and AK Interactive weathering products. The user is looking for advanced techniques for photo-etching and wire details for their models. The user is interested in adding antennas and aerials to their B-29 bomber. The user is seeking specific weathering techniques and products suitable for a 1/72 scale model. The user is advised to use a thin, flexible wire (0.1-0.2 mm diameter) for creating antennas and aerials. The user is encouraged to collect reference images of real B-29 bombers for accuracy in detailing. The user is reminded to take their time and practice when adding details to their model.
